'''Temple Atun''' was the steepest of the ancient [[Massassi Temple|temples]] of the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. It was left as it was for thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|year]], except for its outer chambers which had been looted. A trap consisting of two large sliding stones prevented the inner chambers from being entered and still contained the crushed remains of [[Scoundrel/Legends|thieves]] who tried to access it.

[[Stonebat]]s and [[Kitehawk/Legends|kitehawks]] later made it their home.

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] made it his sanctuary for a period of time and requested that [[Streen]] meet him at the top of the temple.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
